content.problemStatement:
Chef has just started watching Game of Thrones, and he wants to first calculate the exact time (in minutes) that it'll take him to complete the series.

The series has SSS seasons, and the ithi^{th}ith season has EiE_iEi‚Äã episodes, each of which are Li,1,Li,2,‚Ä¶,Li,EiL_{i,1}, L_{i,2}, \ldots, L_{i,E_i}Li,1‚Äã,Li,2‚Äã,‚Ä¶,Li,Ei‚Äã‚Äã minutes long. Note that these Li,jL_{i,j}Li,j‚Äã include the duration of the beginning intro song in each episode. The streaming service that he uses, allows Chef to skip the intro song. The intro song changes slightly each season, and so he wants to watch the intro song in the first episode of each season, but he'll skip it in all other episodes of that season (yes, we know, a sacrilege!). You know that the intro song lasts for QiQ_iQi‚Äã minutes in the ithi^{th}ith season.

Find the total time in minutes, that he has to watch.

Input:
First line will contain a single integer, TTT, denoting the number of testcases. Then the testcases follow.
The first line of each testcase will contain a single integer SSS, denoting the total number of seasons.
The second line contains SSS space separated integers, Q1,Q2,‚Ä¶,QSQ_1, Q_2, \ldots, Q_SQ1‚Äã,Q2‚Äã,‚Ä¶,QS‚Äã, where QiQ_iQi‚Äã denotes the duration of the intro song in the ithi^{th}ith season.
The ithi^{th}ith of the next SSS lines contains Ei+1E_i + 1Ei‚Äã+1 space separated integers, where the first integer is EiE_iEi‚Äã, denoting the number of episodes in the ithi^{th}ith season. That is followed by the duration of each of the EiE_iEi‚Äã episodes, Li,1,Li,2,‚Ä¶,Li,EiL_{i,1}, L_{i,2}, \ldots, L_{i,E_i}Li,1‚Äã,Li,2‚Äã,‚Ä¶,Li,Ei‚Äã‚Äã.
Output:For each testcase, output the answer in a single line.
constraints: Sum of all EiE_iEi‚Äã in a single testcase is at most 10510^5105
1‚â§Qi<Li,j1 \leq Q_i \lt L_{i,j}1‚â§Qi‚Äã<Li,j‚Äã, for all valid jjj.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
1 in the beginning denotes there is only 111 test case.
Testcase 1:
There are 222 seasons. The intro song in each of the first season episodes lasts for 111 minute, and the intro song in the second season episodes lasts for 222 minutes each.
For the first season, since there is only 111 episode, Chef will be watching it completely - 222 minutes.
For the second season, Chef will be watching the first episode completely (333 minutes) and will skip the intro song of the second episode (4‚àí2=24 - 2 = 24‚àí2=2 minutes).
So, the total time spent is 2+(3+(4‚àí2))=72 + (3 + (4 - 2)) = 72+(3+(4‚àí2))=7 minutes.

Explanation:
2 in the beginning denotes there are 222 test cases.
Testcase 1:
There is only 111 season having intro song for 101010 minutes.
Chef will have to watch the entire first episode including the intro song and will be skipping the same in further seasons.
So, the total time spent is (11+(11‚àí10)‚àó4)=15(11 + (11 - 10) * 4) = 15(11+(11‚àí10)‚àó4)=15 minutes.
Testcase 2:
There are total 555 seasons. The intro song in every season lasts for 101010 minutes.
For each of the five seasons, since there is only 111 episode, Chef will be watching all of them completely - 111111 minutes each.
So, the total time spent is 11‚àó5=5511 * 5 = 5511‚àó5=55 minutes.
